items.title_en: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
items.title_zh: 新受托人报告发现社会保障退休信托基金可能会在 2032 年耗尽
items.desc_en: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.
items.desc_zh: 社会保障管理局发布了一份报告，其中对帮助支付福利的信托基金何时可能耗尽进行了新的预测。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. must 'respond' after Iran shoots down helicopter over Hormuz Strait
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡击落直升机后美国必须“做出回应”

items.title_en: House Republicans push $70 billion immigration funding package toward passage
items.title_zh: 众议院共和党人推动700亿美元移民资助计划获得通过
items.desc_en: The U.S. House on Tuesday is scheduled to vote on a $70 billion immigration enforcement funding package after months of debate.
items.desc_zh: 经过数月的辩论后，美国众议院定于周二就 700 亿美元的移民执法资金计划进行投票。

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: Two reportedly killed as women take part in rare protest in Afghanistan
items.title_zh: 据报道，阿富汗妇女参加罕见抗议活动时造成两人死亡
items.desc_en: The demonstration, in the western city of Herat, was broken up after police are alleged to have opened fire.
items.desc_zh: 据称，警方开枪后，西部城市赫拉特的示威活动被驱散。

items.title_en: Jeffrey Epstein's former assistant Lesley Groff interviewed by House panel
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的前助理莱斯利·格罗夫接受众议院小组采访
items.desc_en: Groff worked for Epstein for nearly 20 years, and her name appears more than 150,000 times in the Epstein files released by the Department of Justice.
items.desc_zh: 格罗夫为爱泼斯坦工作了近20年，她的名字在司法部公布的爱泼斯坦档案中出现了超过15万次。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Truist says Meta has found its next $20 billion business, stock set to gain more than 40%
items.title_zh: Truist 称 Meta 已找到下一个 200 亿美元业务，股价将上涨 40% 以上
items.desc_en: Analysts at Truist estimate Meta's new subscription model could generate over $20 billion in revenue by 2030.
items.desc_zh: Truist 的分析师估计，到 2030 年，Meta 的新订阅模式可能会产生超过 200 亿美元的收入。

items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗和以色列撤回相互攻击后，以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部 - 纽约时报中文网

items.title_en: U.S. customs agency, trade judge to seek path to final tariff refunds
items.title_zh: 美国海关机构、贸易法官寻求最终关税退款途径
items.desc_en: The U.S. Customs and Border Protection agency head to a federal trade court find a way to refund the tariffs that were deemed illegal by the Supreme Court.
items.desc_zh: 美国海关和边境保护局向联邦贸易法院寻求退还被最高法院视为非法的关税的方法。

items.title_en: Home sales surged in May to the highest level since December
items.title_zh: 5月份房屋销售量飙升至12月份以来的最高水平
items.desc_en: Home sales rebounded in May as mortgage rates dropped back a bit in April, but prices are still rising.
items.desc_zh: 随着 4 月份抵押贷款利率略有回落，5 月份房屋销售出现反弹，但价格仍在上涨。

items.title_en: Energy Secretary Chris Wright says traffic in Strait of Hormuz is rising 'very meaningfully'
items.title_zh: 能源部长克里斯赖特表示霍尔木兹海峡的交通量正在“非常有意义”地增长
items.desc_en: Wright said that describing the volume of oil exports out of Hormuz as increasing is a "fair statement."
items.desc_zh: 赖特表示，描述霍尔木兹石油出口量增加是一个“公平的说法”。

items.title_en: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗警告停止袭击，以色列仍对黎巴嫩城市提尔发动空袭
items.desc_en: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗周一警告以色列，如果不停止对其黎巴嫩盟友真主党的袭击，伊朗可能会恢复敌对行动。

items.title_en: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
items.title_zh: 特朗普家族从加密货币投资中获得了约 5 亿美元 - 但投资者却看到了巨额损失
items.desc_en: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.
items.desc_zh: 埃里克·特朗普 (Eric Trump) 和小唐纳德·特朗普 (Donald Trump Jr.) 庆祝与 Alt5 Sigma 达成的一项交易，该交易为特朗普家族带来了约 5 亿美元的收入。该公司股价下跌93%。

items.title_en: JPMorgan Chase plans to deploy more powerful AI agents this year
items.title_zh: 摩根大通计划今年部署更强大的人工智能代理
items.desc_en: JPMorgan Chase's move suggests long-running AI agents are close to clearing the security and governance hurdles that have slowed adoption inside big companies.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，长期运行的人工智能代理即将消除阻碍大公司内部采用的安全和治理障碍。

items.title_zh: 海上无人机在霍尔木兹海峡附近营救美军直升机机组人员
items.desc_en: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.
items.desc_zh: 美国官员告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻，一艘无人船救起了周一坠毁的阿帕奇直升机的两名机组人员。

items.title_en: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla
items.title_zh: Rivian 押注于其 R2 电动汽车，将使该汽车制造商成为像特斯拉一样家喻户晓的品牌
items.desc_en: The R2 SUV is meant to transform Rivian from a niche EV manufacturer that sells luxury vehicles into a more mainstream brand like U.S. EV leader Tesla.
items.desc_zh: R2 SUV 旨在将 Rivian 从一家销售豪华车的小众电动汽车制造商转变为像美国电动汽车领导者特斯拉一样更主流的品牌。

items.title_en: Ariana Grande and Ethan Slater split after three years
items.title_zh: 阿丽亚娜·格兰德 (Ariana Grande) 与伊桑·斯莱特 (Ethan Slater) 交往三年后分手
items.desc_en: The pair met on the set of the first Wicked movie, for which Grande received an Oscar nomination.
items.desc_zh: 两人在第一部《魔法坏女巫》电影的片场相识，格兰德因此获得了奥斯卡提名。

items.title_en: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查显示，51% 的美国成年人表示，美国梦目前对大多数人来说遥不可及
items.desc_en: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.
items.desc_zh: 在 CNBC 的一项独家调查中，81% 的受访者表示，生活成本是他们实现美国梦的最大财务障碍。

items.title_en: Tickets for Iran fans revoked, says federation
items.title_zh: 伊朗足协表示，伊朗球迷的门票已被吊销
items.desc_en: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗足协表示，就在比赛前几天，其世界杯小组赛门票的分配已被取消。

items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_zh: 男子被控用有毒沙爹杀害婆婆
items.desc_en: Indonesia police allege the man killed the woman as he felt disrespected by her.
items.desc_zh: 印度尼西亚警方称，该男子因感到不受尊重而杀害了该女子。

items.desc_zh: 伊拉克库尔德人被民兵抓获，民兵要求每人支付 5,000 美元（3,700 英镑）的赎金。

items.title_en: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
items.title_zh: 特朗普成为第一位出席 NBA 总决赛的美国总统，在纽约遭到嘘声
items.desc_en: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.
items.desc_zh: 购票者在进入麦迪逊广场花园的场馆时要面临机场式的安检，随后引发了阵阵嘘声。

items.title_en: Russia's fuel crisis intensifies as Ukraine steps up strikes on occupied territories
items.title_zh: 乌克兰加大对被占领土的打击力度，俄罗斯燃料危机加剧
items.desc_en: Kyiv has made it difficult for Moscow to provide military and civilian supplies to the territories it occupies.
items.desc_zh: 基辅使莫斯科难以向其占领的领土提供军事和民用物资。

items.desc_zh: 一键将任何 Figma 形状变成液态金属

items.title_en: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
items.title_zh: 美国农业部部长罗林斯称德克萨斯州农业负责人在螺旋虫威胁中“不认真”
items.desc_en: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.
items.desc_zh: 尽管得到了特朗普的支持，但得克萨斯州农业专员西德·米勒 (Sid Miller) 在 3 月份的共和党初选中失去了第四个任期。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。
